name: 描述前人工作
description: 用于综述既有发现、观点、理论框架和文献分歧

clusters.meaning: 前人研究已经表明/证实

expressions.note: 最常用、最稳妥，适合引入稳定发现
expressions.example: Prior research has shown that education delays union formation.

expressions.en: a large body of work documents
expressions.note: 强调文献规模大，适合已充分积累的领域
expressions.example: A large body of work documents gender gaps in earnings.

expressions.note: 语气较强，只适合高度共识的结论
expressions.example: It is well established that parental education predicts attainment.

expressions.note: 强调认识由来已久，适合理论或经典发现
expressions.example: Scholars have long recognized the stratifying role of schools.

expressions.note: 比 consistent with 更有文献对话感。
expressions.example: The result echoes previous research on fertility costs.

expressions.note: 语气比 confirms 弱，适合不做强因果或唯一性声称。
expressions.example: This finding resonates with recent research.

expressions.note: 强调证据正在积累，但仍保留谨慎空间
expressions.example: Growing evidence suggests that housing costs shape fertility timing.

expressions.note: 适合新兴领域，强调研究方向正在形成
expressions.example: An emerging literature shows how algorithms sort workers.

expressions.note: 强调近年研究的共同指向，适合更新文献综述
expressions.example: Recent studies increasingly point to the importance of wealth.

expressions.en: a mounting body of evidence indicates
expressions.note: 语气更强，突出证据数量和一致性
expressions.example: A mounting body of evidence indicates rising mental health inequalities.

expressions.note: 通用观点引入，适合理论和解释性主张
expressions.example: Scholars argue that institutions structure life-course choices.

expressions.note: 强调某类解释的重点，适合对比不同理论
expressions.example: Some accounts emphasize cultural norms over material constraints.

expressions.en: one line of research maintains that
expressions.note: 适合区分文献流派，语气较正式
expressions.example: One line of research maintains that networks reduce search costs.

expressions.note: 适合承接刚介绍的理论视角，避免重复 scholars
expressions.example: This perspective holds that norms shape perceived constraints.

expressions.note: 最常用，适合指出文献主流关注对象
expressions.example: Research has focused primarily on wages and employment.

expressions.note: 比 focused on 更紧凑，强调研究中心
expressions.example: The debate has centered on occupational choice.

expressions.note: 强调特别关注，不一定暗示忽视其他方面
expressions.example: This literature has paid particular attention to maternal employment.

expressions.note: 更抽象，适合描述研究取向或理论方向
expressions.example: Policy research has been oriented toward short-term outcomes.

expressions.en: an alternative line of research highlights
expressions.note: 用于引出竞争观点或补充机制，比 other studies say 更学术。
expressions.example: An alternative line of research highlights flexibility paradoxes.

expressions.note: 最简洁通用，适合概括结果不一致
expressions.example: Findings have been mixed on the returns to vocational training.

expressions.note: 强调证据不足以定论，语气比 mixed 更谨慎
expressions.example: The evidence remains inconclusive for immigrant health trajectories.

expressions.note: 强调研究之间结论分叉，适合引出解释差异
expressions.example: Studies reach divergent conclusions about peer effects.

expressions.note: 强调学界没有形成共识，适合提出本文必要性
expressions.example: There is little consensus on how debt affects marriage.

expressions.note: 明确标记主流观点，适合随后修正或挑战
expressions.example: The dominant view is that education promotes tolerance.

expressions.note: 语气比 dominant 更温和，强调常见解释
expressions.example: A common interpretation is that mobility reflects merit.

expressions.note: 更学术，突出主流解释中的重点机制
expressions.example: The prevailing account emphasizes individual preferences.

expressions.note: 适合引出传统解释，并为替代解释铺垫
expressions.example: Conventional explanations point to differences in skills.

expressions.note: 标准理论陈述，适合正式介绍理论命题
expressions.example: Status attainment theory posits that family resources shape outcomes.

expressions.note: 适合从理论视角转入具体推论，避免重复 theory
expressions.example: From this perspective, migration is a household strategy.

expressions.note: 强调理论关注的机制或维度，适合综述多个框架
expressions.example: This framework highlights the role of institutional gatekeeping.

expressions.note: 强调理论帮助观察某个被忽略的方面
expressions.example: The theory directs attention to nonmonetary forms of support.

expressions.note: 比 support 更正式，常用于结果与理论预期一致。
expressions.example: The findings lend support to border theory.

expressions.note: 结果段常用，比 as expected 更正式。
expressions.example: This pattern is in line with our expectations.

expressions.note: 最常用，适合清楚划分两个概念
expressions.example: We distinguish between temporary and chronic poverty.

expressions.en: draw a distinction between A and B
expressions.note: 更书面，强调作者主动建立概念边界
expressions.example: The paper draws a distinction between choice and constraint.

expressions.note: 强调把相近概念分开，语气更直接
expressions.example: The framework differentiates mobility from mere movement.

expressions.en: treat A and B as analytically distinct
expressions.note: 强调分析上分开，即使现实中可能相互交织
expressions.example: We treat income and wealth as analytically distinct.
